rationale: The citing paper’s core claims depend on moderated effects (joint goal progress × relationship power) and follow-up conditional-effect interpretation across field and experimental studies, which is exactly the analytic problem addressed by the cited methodological article on spotlight/floodlight simple-effects tests in moderated regression. Given this strong method-to-analysis alignment (despite only one DOI-matched reference entry), this is not clearly an incidental background mention and should be retained for full relation judgment.
